response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, including some Java exposure and IDE-related work at National Instruments, but lacks demonstrable deep expertise in JVM tooling, Spring, or enterprise IDE development — his recent work is heavily TypeScript/Node.js focused, with minimal evidence of JVM ecosystem contributions.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility with experience in multiple languages and systems
Proven track record in developer tooling and open-source contributions
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No recent or substantial Java/Kotlin or Spring ecosystem work in last 5+ years
Primary recent tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js, not JVM or IDE internals
Limited evidence of enterprise build tool, application server, or IDE subsystem ownership
